description: RR3 Community Edition version manifest. Controls OTA update offerings.

versions.changelog:
## 🎉 RR3 Community Edition - Initial Release

### ✨ Features
- 🖥️ Community server support
- 👥 Friends & multiplayer
- 📊 Leaderboards & tournaments
- 🔄 OTA auto-updates (WiFi & mobile data)
- 🌐 Server browser
- 📱 Android 6.0+ support

### 🎮 What This Is
Real Racing 3 Community Edition preserves the game after EA's server shutdown. Connect to community-run servers and keep racing!

### ⚠️ Requirements
- Android 6.0 (API 23) or higher
- Original RR3 game installation or data
- Internet connection for multiplayer

### ⚖️ Legal
This is an independent community project. Not affiliated with EA. See [LEGAL.md](https://github.com/project-real-resurrection-3/.github/blob/main/LEGAL.md) for full legal documentation.

---

🏁 **The game will never die!** 🏁
versions.notes: Initial community release. Accepts upgrades from any version (EA's official or community).

_comments.schema_version: Manifest format version. Increment if structure changes.
_comments.last_updated: ISO 8601 timestamp of last manifest update.
_comments.channels: Update channels. Users stay in their channel unless they opt-in to another.
_comments.versions: Array of all available versions. Order doesn't matter.
_comments.version_code: Integer for comparison. Formula: major*10000 + minor*100 + patch (e.g., v15.0.0 = 150000, v14.5.0 = 140500)
_comments.upgrade_from: Array of versions that can upgrade to this one. Empty = initial release.
_comments.download_url: Direct APK download URL from GitHub Releases.
_comments.file_size: APK file size in bytes. 0 = pending upload.
_comments.maintenance: To add new version: 1) Create GitHub release, 2) Update this JSON with new entry, 3) Update channel 'latest', 4) Commit and push
